# BLVSTACK

> AI systems studio. We design and build custom AI agents, automation systems, and AI-native websites for businesses ready to scale without hiring more people.

BLVSTACK is a founder-led studio operating at the intersection of AI infrastructure and editorial design. We work with founders and operators who need an operating system — not a tool — and want to own the code that runs their business.

## What we build

- **L1 · AI Agents** — conversational systems that qualify, book, follow up, and handle real operational work. Chat, voice, multi-turn workflows. Built on Anthropic and OpenAI, deployed to production.
- **L2 · Automation Systems** — event-driven workflows that replace manual operational tasks. CRM sync, document automation, scheduled jobs, status orchestration.
- **L3 · AI-Native Websites** — marketing sites with agents and intelligence built into the architecture, not bolted on. Custom design, premium craft.

## How we work

- Four phases: **Audit · Design · Build · Deploy**
- 2–6 week typical engagement length depending on layer scope
- Limited engagements per quarter to maintain craft level
- Founder-led: same person scopes, designs, ships
- Production-grade by default — monitoring, logs, error handling on day one
- Client owns the code, codebase, and infrastructure — no platform lock-in

## Featured case study

- **Precise Aesthetics** — `/work/precise-aesthetics` — The launch site for The Precise System™, a clinical pico laser platform built around four pillars (Protocols, Delivery, Biologic Control, Data Intelligence). Built in 4 weeks for a high-stakes product launch.

## Key pages

- Home: https://blvstack.com/
- Services: https://blvstack.com/services
- Work: https://blvstack.com/work
- About: https://blvstack.com/about
- Start a Project: https://blvstack.com/start
- Contact: https://blvstack.com/contact

## Engagement

- For project work, use [Start a Project](https://blvstack.com/start). Seven-step intake, reviewed weekly, 24-hour response window.
- For everything else, use [Contact](https://blvstack.com/contact) or email hello@blvstack.com directly.

## Principles

- Systems beat features
- The client owns the code
- Less surface, more depth
- Production-grade by default
- Speed is a quality

## Things BLVSTACK does NOT do

- Templated WordPress / Shopify sites
- No-code-only builds without owned code
- Hourly retainers without scoped deliverables
- Generic chatbot widgets

## Contact

- Email: hello@blvstack.com
- Response window: within 24 hours, business days
